# QuickBot — Performance

## Headline stats

- **>95% accuracy** on support ticket resolution
- **<10 second response time** for most queries
- **80%+ automation rate** for our customers

## How we measure

We track which tickets get resolved without escalation. Our customers love the results.

## Customer quotes

> "QuickBot just works." — early customer
> "We saved 40 hours a week." — another customer
> "Setup was a breeze." — a third customer

## Roadmap

We're working on detailed benchmarks and a public eval dataset. Stay tuned!
